meta.title: birds.family – A family of birds for your family
meta.description: birds.family is a collection of small, focused apps – each designed to solve one clearly defined problem. Offline, private, simple.

hero.headline: birds.family
hero.subtitle: A family of birds for your family
hero.imgAlt: A bird family sitting on a branch

souvenirbird.description: One memory a day. A gentle space for parents to capture the small moments of childhood. Offline & private.

bebebirdie.description: A gentle space for parents to soothe their little ones into peaceful sleep. Offline & private.

mamanbird.description: Growth, fever, shoe sizes and more. A calm everyday helper for parents. Offline & private.

itembird.description: ItemBird manages objects, inventory, and belongings. Offline & private.

moreBirds.headline: More birds coming
moreBirds.description: New apps are in the nest. Stay tuned.

story.text:
The Birds began as a simple idea:
small, gentle helpers for the everyday moments of family life.
Each bird carries a purpose.
Each one solves one small thing.
Together, they form a quiet little family — made for yours.

meta.title: SouvenirBird – One Memory a Day
meta.description: SouvenirBird is a simple, loving memory app for parents to capture daily moments of childhood. Offline, private, no account needed.

souvenirbird.headline: One memory a day
souvenirbird.subtitle: A gentle space for parents to capture the small moments of childhood. One memory is enough.
souvenirbird.lead: SouvenirBird is a simple, loving app for parents to capture the small moments of their children's lives. One memory is enough – but you can add as many as you like. Offline, private, without account. Fast, light, warm, and perfect for everyday life.

f1.title: One memory a day
f1.text: One memory is enough to capture what matters. No pressure, no overwhelm – but add more anytime you want.

f2.title: Offline & private
f2.text: Your memories stay on your device. No cloud, no account, no tracking. Completely private.

f3.title: Designed for parents
f3.text: Created by parents, for parents. Simple, warm, and designed for busy family life.

f4.title: Simple, warm, clutter-free
f4.text: No distractions, no complexity. Just a gentle space to remember what matters.

meta.title: About – birds.family
meta.description: The story behind birds.family — small, focused apps for the everyday moments of family life.

about.headline: About
about.storyText:
The Birds began as a simple idea:
small, gentle helpers for the everyday moments of family life.
Each bird carries a purpose.
Each one solves one small thing.
Together, they form a quiet little family — made for yours.
about.flockText:
The owl watches over the night.
The dove carries memories.
The robin brings warmth.
The blue tit helps with the everyday.
The magpie keeps the things that matter.
about.flockOutro:
A small flock, each with a purpose.
A family of birds for your family.
about.approachText:
Small apps. One purpose each.
No accounts. No clouds. No noise.
Just simple tools that stay close to home —
like little birds perched quietly in your day.
about.whyText:
Families don't need more complexity.
They need small moments of calm.
A memory captured.
A night made easier.
A task simplified.
That's why the Birds exist.

meta.title: Privacy Policy – birds.family
meta.description: Privacy Policy for birds.family – your data stays on your device. No cloud, no tracking.

meta.title: Imprint – birds.family
meta.description: Legal imprint and contact information for birds.family.

meta.title: BébéBirdie – Calming Sounds for Better Baby Sleep
meta.description: BébéBirdie helps your baby fall asleep with gentle and calming sleep sounds. Offline, no account needed.

bebebirdie.headline: Calming sounds for better baby sleep
bebebirdie.subtitle: Gentle sleep sounds to help your baby fall asleep peacefully. Soft, soothing, and designed for little ones.
bebebirdie.lead: BébéBirdie helps your baby fall asleep with gentle and calming sleep sounds. The app offers a peaceful collection of night noises, soft ambience, and soothing tones designed to relax infants and create a comforting bedtime routine. With its simple interface and adorable owl theme, BébéBirdie makes bedtime easier for both babies and parents.

f1.title: Soft & calming sleep sounds
f1.text: A peaceful collection of night noises, soft ambience, and soothing tones designed to relax your baby.

f2.title: Loop mode
f2.text: Continuous, uninterrupted playback all night long – so you don't have to touch your phone again.

f3.title: Cozy owl theme
f3.text: Adorable owl design and a calm, starry atmosphere that puts babies – and parents – in the mood for sleep.

f4.title: Works offline
f4.text: No internet needed during the night. Simple, intuitive, and completely private – no account required.

bebebirdie.footerTagline: Give your baby a peaceful night's sleep.

meta.title: MamanBird – Growth, Fever & Shoe Sizes at a Glance
meta.description: MamanBird is a calm everyday helper for parents. Track growth, fever, and shoe sizes – simple, private, no account needed.

mamanbird.headline: Your calm everyday helper for parents
mamanbird.subtitle: Growth, fever, shoe sizes and more – simple, private, no account needed. All data stays on your device.
mamanbird.lead: Children grow fast, and many small details get lost in the everyday rush. MamanBird helps you keep track: When was the last fever? What shoe size fits now? How tall is your child? Offline, private, no account needed. Just open it, add an entry, done.

f1.title: Growth, fever & shoe sizes
f1.text: All the important measurements for your child in one place. Easy to log, always ready to look up.

f2.title: Offline & private
f2.text: All data stays on your device. No cloud, no account, no tracking. Completely private.

f3.title: Made for multiple kids
f3.text: Manage all your children's data in one app – clearly organised and neatly separated.

f4.title: Clear & clutter-free
f4.text: Intentionally minimal – no ads, no noise. Just open it, add an entry, done.

mamanbird.footerTagline: For parents who prefer simple, focused tools.
